_meta.experiment: #97 rank-16 A/B — isolate {model, alpha-scale} for the reported rank-16 distill failure
_meta.pipeline: distill_sweep.py, K=2, seq128, 300 steps, seed0, ApiQ(LoftQ-style) init
verdict: SCALE (alpha/rank) is the determinant, NOT model or rank-capacity.
scale=2 (alpha=2*rank): rank16 base 0.293 / inst 0.227; rank64 base 0.273 -> rank16~=rank64 (rank not limiting).
scale=8 (alpha=128,rank16): base 0.0067 / inst 0.0067 -> reproduces the reported ~0.013 failure.
CONCLUSION: the reported rank-16 failure was an alpha=128/rank=16 (scale-8) mismatch, not an adapter-capacity limit. rank-16 at alpha=2*rank recovers ~0.23-0.29 (=rank-64).
